All these timing will work. Do not take too many criterias
for analysis purpose. Stick to one or two criteria, a
person will be very successful with the predictions.
Do not get influenced by mass media. Normally I avoid
seeing TV or papers because this helps a lot in easy
predictions with out any bias.
